message:
🌱 Trust Copilot app for DCO checks

Skip DCO signoff requirement for PRs authored by GitHub Copilot
(copilot-swe-agent). This allows Copilot-generated PRs to pass
the DCO check automatically without manual override.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,12 @@ lgtm:
     # preserves lgtm on rebase or squash
     store_tree_hash: true
 
+dco:
+  kubestellar:  # Org-wide
+    # Trust GitHub Copilot app - skip DCO check for Copilot-authored PRs
+    trusted_apps:
+      - copilot-swe-agent
+
 # config_updater will automatically update the config configmap when config.yaml changes
 config_updater:
   maps:
